sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, date_value Date32);
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, toDate32OrDefault('1999-12-31', toDate32('2020-01-01')));
UPDATE test_dates SET date_value = toDate32OrDefault('2030-01-01', toDate32('2020-01-01')) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, date_value, toDate32OrDefault('invalid-date', toDate32('2020-01-01')) AS default_value FROM test_dates;
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (2, toDate32OrDefault('2021-02-25', toDate32('2020-01-01'))), (3, toDate32OrDefault('1899-01-01', toDate32('2020-01-01')));
